---
title = "Python"
---

*Calepin* embeds Python via [PyO3](https://pyo3.rs/), running code directly in process. A shared globals dictionary persists variables across chunks.

# Basic usage

```{python}
#| echo = fenced
import math
primes = [2, 3, 5, 7, 11, 13]
print(f"Sum: {sum(primes)}, Mean: {sum(primes)/len(primes):.1f}")
```

# Inline expressions

The square root of 2 is `{python} f"{2**0.5:.4f}"`.

# Persistent state

Variables defined in one chunk are available in later chunks:

```{python}
message = "Hello from Python"
```

```{python}
print(message.upper())
```

# Plots

Matplotlib figures are captured automatically:

```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import math

x = [i / 10 for i in range(63)]
y = [math.sin(v) for v in x]
plt.plot(x, y)
plt.title("Sine wave")
plt.xlabel("x")
plt.ylabel("sin(x)")
plt.show()
```
